# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: "edge",
};

type EdgeConfigShape = {
  API_KEY?: string;
  DB_URL?: string;
  FEATURE_FLAGS?: Record<string, boolean>;
};

const DEFAULT_API_KEY = "vercel_default_key_789";
const DEFAULT_DB_URL = "postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com";
const DEFAULT_FEATURE_FLAGS: Record<string, boolean> = {};

function safeParseEdgeConfig(raw: string | undefined): EdgeConfigShape {
  if (!raw) return {};
  try {
    return JSON.parse(raw) as EdgeConfigShape;
  } catch {
    return {};
  }
}

function getConfig() {
  const edgeConfig = safeParseEdgeConfig(process.env.EDGE_CONFIG);

  const apiKey = edgeConfig.API_KEY ?? DEFAULT_API_KEY;
  const dbUrl = edgeConfig.DB_URL ?? DEFAULT_DB_URL;
  const featureFlags = edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS ?? DEFAULT_FEATURE_FLAGS;

  return {
    apiKey,
    dbUrl,
    featureFlags,
  };
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const { apiKey, dbUrl, featureFlags } = getConfig();

  const payload = {
    ok: true,
    config: {
      API_KEY: apiKey,
      DB_URL: dbUrl,
      FEATURE_FLAGS: featureFlags,
    },
  };

  return new Response(JSON.stringify(payload), {
    status: 200,
    headers: {
      "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
    },
  });
}
